calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christie Fraser for Anne Winkes (Petitioner).

Ms. Fraser asked the Court to recognize the responsibility and potential liability the Trustee has to the Beneficiaries, stated that the Trust has been litigious, that it would be difficult to have someone else step in and that none of the Beneficiaries are objecting. Ms. Fraser also stated that she has waivers of accountings which she will file and that all of the Beneficiaries agreed to an informal accounting. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #7, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christie Fraser for Anne Winkes (Petitioner/Trsutee).

Ms. Fraser stated that it was a matter of Ms. Castro signing the Receipt on Distribution and that she will file it as soon as she receives it. Mr. Fraser also addressed the issue of the Trustee's fees, the quarterly accountings, the Paralegal's fees as well as the Attorney's fees. The matter was taken under submission for the issue of commissions and fees. Otherwise the accounting petition is approved.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #6, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christie Fraser for Ann Winkes (Petitioner/Trustee).

Ms. Frasier addressed the issue of the fee request and confirmed that $4,802.50 needs to come off of the net amount of $57,940.45. The Court dispensed with direct notice to the Minor and Schwarz as notice was sent to two seperate Law Firms for each party. The request to exonerate bond and to sell the real property without court confirmation is granted. The fees were taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christie Fraser for Anne Winkes. Richard Shearer for Donna Castro (Mother of Martha Castro).

Mr. Shearer stated that Ms. Castro takes no position on the petition and that the only concern was that Martha had not received the gifts, but that they were working it out. Ms. Fraser explained the extent of services provided by the Trustee as well as the Paralegal to support the fee requests, stated that the Trustee's fees requested were based on the the formula in the settlement agreement and that there was no overlap. The Court informed Ms. Fraser that the amount allowed for non-professional Trustees was $40.00 per hour. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Jackson.
